## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct an interview with Patrick D Nielsen for the Technical Managing Editor position at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pat has extensive experience in AI, prompt engineering, and content strategy, particularly with Microsoft and various clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [GrowthX is seeking a self-starter who can manage projects, improve workflows, and provide editorial oversight while working independently.](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [The role requires adaptability, strong client management skills, and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced startup environment.](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Role Overview

  - [Position: Technical Managing Editor with dual focus on project management and editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [Manage deliverables and timelines for clients](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Provide editorial layer on content before client submission](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Identify and improve workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [Act as a bridge between account directors and strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Company leverages AI for content production at scale, focusing on SEO and generative AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Pat's Experience and Skills

  - [5 years working with Microsoft on various contracts, including AI projects](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Recent focus on AI with Shipley, working with clients like WPS Global, Lego, and Target](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Expertise in prompt engineering and AI platforms (e.g., Responsive AI)](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Strong background in content strategy and customer-focused writing](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Experience in managing large-scale proposals (e.g., 3,000-question RFP for WPS Global)](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Proficient in project management tools: Microsoft Project, JIRA, Confluence, ADO, DevOps](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)

### Client Management and Project Handling

  - [Emphasis on nurturing client relationships and building trust](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Experience managing projects through submission, coordinating with writers, editors, and marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Uses checklists and prioritization techniques to manage multiple projects](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Advocates for clear communication, transparency, and meeting deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Startup Environment and Expectations

  - [GrowthX requires adaptability and the ability to work with ambiguity](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Limited documentation and support; need for self-starters who can create processes](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
  - [Expectation to reach out cross-functionally when needed and push projects forward independently](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
  - [Importance of making decisions quickly and living with consequences in a fast-paced environment](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pat to demonstrate ability to run workflows and generate quality content inputs within the first month](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Focus on identifying and addressing issues in content outputs](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Provide QA and UX feedback internally while generating content externally](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Pat to showcase self-starting capabilities and cross-functional collaboration skills](https://fathom.video/share/Axv2oTq9zLDcJfWTDiZ34KPAZyJc_Ti5?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
